evals.prompt: I need a new Node.js project for a CLI tool that processes CSV files. Just set up the project structure and tooling, I'll add the CSV logic myself.
evals.expected_output: A scaffolded JS project with package.json (type: module), eslint.config.js with functional rules, prettier.config.js, .editorconfig, .gitignore, vitest.config.js, and a starter src/index.js + src/index.test.js. No Playwright since this is a backend project. All lint/format/test commands should pass.
expectations: eslint.config.js exists and uses flat config format (export default [])
ESLint config bans ClassDeclaration and ClassExpression
src/index.test.js imports from src/index.js and has passing tests
The skill presented defaults and asked for confirmation before scaffolding

evals.prompt: Set up a new React project for a dashboard app. I want the full tooling — linting, formatting, testing, the works.
evals.expected_output: A scaffolded JS project with all standard configs plus Playwright for e2e testing. Should include playwright.config.js and an e2e/ directory. The package.json should have a test:e2e script.
expectations: e2e/ directory exists with at least one spec file
The skill presented defaults and asked for confirmation before scaffolding

evals.prompt: Init a JS project but I want tabs instead of spaces, semicolons on, and 4-space tab width. Everything else can be default.
evals.expected_output: Standard scaffold but with customized formatting: prettier uses tabs, semicolons, tabWidth 4. EditorConfig uses tab indent. ESLint still has functional rules.
